men.summary: The Bluejays are struggling through a disappointing 2025-26 campaign with a 15-17 overall record and 9-11 mark in Big East play, coming off their latest loss in what has been a difficult stretch of 3-7 over their last 10 games. With a poor 2-8 record in Quadrant 1 games and a sub-.500 conference record, their postseason prospects appear bleak barring a dramatic turnaround in their remaining games.

women.summary: The Bluejays sit at .500 overall with a 16-15 record but have performed well in Big East play at 11-9, though their 0-5 record against Quadrant 1 opponents significantly hurts their NCAA Tournament resume. Despite a strong 7-3 mark over their last 10 games, their lack of quality wins and struggles away from home (6-8) likely leaves them on the outside looking in for March Madness, making them a candidate for the WNIT instead.
